title: Replace Navbar and Footer logo with newly uploaded logo

requirements.text: Replace the logo image currently displayed in the Navbar and Footer components with the newly uploaded logo served from frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.png. Display it at an appropriate size in both components, preserving its aspect ratio.
acceptanceCriteria: The Navbar displays the new logo image from frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.png
The Footer displays the new logo image from frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.png
The logo aspect ratio is preserved in both Navbar and Footer
No broken image links or placeholder images remain in Navbar or Footer

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx
Do not alter any other sections or components beyond Navbar and Footer
nonGoals: Changing any other branding or copy on the page
Updating any sections other than Navbar and Footer

edits: Replace logo with the newly uploaded official Digital Marketing Town logo (dmti-logo.png > dmti-logo.png)
